title: Grounded RAG Knowledge Assistant
description: Build a retrieval-augmented knowledge assistant for an enterprise client. The system must answer questions only from a curated corpus, cite its sources, and abstain when it lacks grounding. Backend in Python/FastAPI over PostgreSQL with a vector search layer; a small React UI; deployed on GCP.

title: Data Platform Modernization on GCP
description: Modernize a client's batch data platform. Re-platform ETL pipelines, add lineage and orchestration, and move infrastructure to GCP with Terraform. Needs strong data engineering plus DevOps, with product oversight to keep stakeholders aligned on phased delivery.
